name: Shallot & Peach Chutney
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Peaches - or papaya or mango
3 ounces Shallots - peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the peaches (or papaya or mango), shallots, vinegar and lemon juice.
2. Bring to boiling; reduce heat.
3. Simmer, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes.
4. Add remaining ingredients to pan.
5. Simmer, stirring frequently, for 15 minutes.
6. Cool; spoon into refrigerator or freezer containers.
7. Cover and chill.
8. Serve chilled or at room temperature with roasts, barbecued meats, on burgers, or with fish.
Makes 3-1/4 cups (allow about 2 tablespoons per serving).
